not_a_verdict: Masking regression: a repaired JOB (local_reference) can never read as production liveness. SUBMITTED for independent verification.
claim: A successful repair job with receipt_origin=local_reference must NOT establish production RUNNING_CONFIRMED.
proof: production_running_confirmed(receipt_origin='local_reference', ...) => False, blocked_reason=non_production_origin:local_reference (tests/test_software_repair_provenance_v1.py: test_local_reference_cannot_confirm_production + property test across all non-production origins).
separation: Customer-job success (repaired) and infrastructure liveness (RUNNING_CONFIRMED) are distinct predicates — proven in test_customer_job_success_is_separate_from_infra_liveness.
